ddls:
CREATE TABLE "endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each endpoint */,
  "endpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the endpoint */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the endpoint (e.g., data center, region) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the endpoint (e.g., healthy, in panic) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the endpoint */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number of the endpoint */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Communication protocol used by the endpoint (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the endpoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint the metric belongs to */,
  "health_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of health (0-100%) */,
  "is_healthy" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the endpoint is healthy */,
  "is_in_panic" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the endpoint is in panic */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the health measurement */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage percentage */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic distribution record */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint receiving traffic */,
  "traffic_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of traffic directed to the endpoint */,
  "distribution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the traffic distribution */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of traffic directed to the endpoint */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Packet loss percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_distribution_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "total_health_percentage" REAL /* Normalized total health percentage of the network (0-100%) */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance measurement */,
  "average_latency" REAL /* Average latency of the network */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate of the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., health warning, panic state) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "acknowledged" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert has been acknowledged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, operator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, alert_acknowledged) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "endpoint_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "endpoint_group_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endpoint_group_membership_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endpoint_group_membership_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES endpoint_groups ("group_id")
)
